examples: A receiver and amplifier receive the radio waves from the sub reflector, and make these weak radio waves strong enough to be recorded and turned into electronic signals.
Most antennas are made in the shape of a dish to collect and reflect the radio waves to the sub reflector, in the same way as a curved mirror focuses visible light to one point.
The reflector is held onto the sides of the spacecraft with a frame.
If you are only a reflector of information, are you really there?
The headlight even has a large reflector installed to maximize its brightness.
